title: fimbristylis littoralis
intro: Fimbristylis littoralis, also known as sea grass or coastal grass, is a type of aquatic grass that grows in coastal areas, particularly in tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fimbristylis littoralis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as aiding in digestion and reducing inflammation. Traditionally, Fimbristylis littoralis is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water, or as a decoction by boiling the roots and leaves in water.
